title: scoping issue of functions and with
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE bar (id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50), value DECIMAL(10, 2) DEFAULT NULL);
CREATE TABLE baz (ref_id INT, description TEXT NOT NULL, FOREIGN KEY (ref_id) REFERENCES bar(id));
SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM baz) AS subquery WHERE ref_id IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: scoping issue of functions in SQL queries
